chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-779 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 08.11.2016. Mr. Omparkash H. Karmani, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G = The main grievance of the petitioner is that on account of political rivalry the private respondents are continuously causing harassment to the petitioner and the police officials are not providing him any legal protection. Learned A.A.G has already filed parawise comments, according to which a FIR was initially lodged against the petitioner but latter he was released under Section 169 Cr.P.C. He further submits that police officials have undertaken to provide legal protection to the petitioner and will not patronize any individual including private respondents. With these observations, the present constitutional petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
